items.title: Netanyahu says Israel will intensify strikes against Hezbollah
items.dek: The Israeli military hits targets in eastern Lebanon after the prime minister announces further strikes.

items.title: Watch: Only world record broken at Enhanced Games won't be recognised
items.dek: The BBC's Shaimaa Khalil explains why the achievement by Greek swimmer Kristian Gkolomeev will not be accepted by official sporting bodies.
